action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: vendor name variation resolved by tax ID and master record.

records.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-65B725086F96: an operator asks whether to proceed with vendor name variation resolved by tax ID and master record. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring.

Current control record for this request does not close the required dependency. The record for tax ID and vendor master alias link is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than vendor name variation resolved by tax ID and master record.
Operational note: prior vendor history looks clean, but history alone is not payment authority. Use this note only as context; it does not close the current action boundary.
Communication boundary: name variation alone is not authority defect. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
